winner: The barber asked if I wanted a trim, but I told him I couldn't let him measure my hair because I'm currently undercover as a very large, very bald potato.

candidates.text: My barber said I needed a haircut, so he took out his ruler and measured my head from ear to ear. I told him I didn't need it that short, but he said, "Sorry, this is how we measure hair around here.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses the required words 'measure' and 'hair', includes a surprising twist with the barber's explanation, and is specific to the situation."}

candidates.text: I tried to measure my hair with a ruler, but it turned out to be a bad idea—now I've got split ends and a broken yardstick.

candidates.text: I told my barber that I wanted to measure my hair, but he said he couldn't do it because he was just trying to keep it in perspective.
